pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect system call flags and time retrieval in UE tracer

### Summary
The UE tracer application contained several bugs related to incorrect system call flags and deprecated time retrieval functions. The `open()` call for shared memory creation lacked the `O_RDWR` flag, leading to potential permission issues. The `gettimeofday()` function was deprecated and less precise than modern alternatives.
